name: Box Carousel
description: This block displays a carousel. The first row will be the title and then each slide will have its own row. Each slide should have 3 elements.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Author this block using the repeatable item structure documented in the sidekick block page and its examples.

usageNotes: -testimonials: for the testimonials style you should always have 4 elements and the first one should be an image
Documented sample names: testimonials, Testimonials with green stars, testimonials-new.
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
